headline: Stop documenting. Start living.
primary_text:
Here's what 2 hours looks like:

→ A full yoga class
→ Dinner with your family, not reheated at 9pm
→ Reading a book that isn't a clinical manual
→ Literally anything except typing SOAP notes

JotPsych handles your session documentation automatically. You see your client. We write the notes. HIPAA-compliant, clinically accurate, done in 3 minutes.

Your evenings are yours again.
description: Free trial. First session takes 5 minutes to set up. That's it.
